tipsTrace.title: How to play
tipsTrace.body: Colored cells form a shape on the grid. Drag in one stroke to visit every colored cell exactly once — no numbers, no prescribed order. From round 7 the grid is 5×5, from round 15 it is 6×6, with longer figures.

tipsTrace.title: One visit each
tipsTrace.body: You cannot step on the same cell twice. Gray cells are not part of the figure; only move on highlighted cells.

tipsTrace.title: Release to submit
tipsTrace.body: Lift your finger to check the path. If you missed a cell or stopped early, try again — your streak resets on a wrong trace.

tipsTrace.title: Time & score
tipsTrace.body: The clock counts down like Path mode. Solved figures add time (less over time) and points scale with size and streak.
